name: Dandys block
description:
They smoke, they drink, they kill and they rob,

There is stro, double d, shanks, goob, baby g, lil p, boost, goob, scraps, cozz and spro, thrifty and silent and deadly

UPDATE: I added a few new toons and changed the intro message bc the old one was crap, the new toons include of, Miss T, shakes, pop, wicket T and officer rodger!! I’ll add more soon!

ANOTHER UPDATE: I added the Christmas toons! Bitty, stamp and bites! I did once again change the intro to fit them in, it’s only a small change though.

EASTER TOONS UPDATE: I added more characters due to demand, the characters are dash, fennel, sunny, milk and crash, crash isn’t an Easter toon but you can’t have flute without dash.

HALLOWEEN TOONS NEXT!
creator: Leosoup
